revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:Infobox instrument/Color]]": [[WP:SEMI|semi-protecting]] highly-visible templates in response to recent template-space vandalism ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require autoconfirmed or confirm...
revision.text: {{#switch: {{{1|}}} | keyboard = #f0e68c | woodwind = #f4bf92 | brass = #bfe0bf | string = #b0c4de | percussion = #d8bfd8 | electronic = #b0e0e6 | other = #d3d3d3 | {{{1|#a9a9a9}}} }} ;NOTE This template is an implementation detail, encapsulating the color association we use for its parent template. It has a single unnamed parameter and expands to * if a name exists among the 16 names supported by the HTML 4.0 standard (aqua, black, blue, fuchsia, gray, green, lime, maroon, navy, olive, purple, red, silver, teal, white, yellow) * # otherwise. No final semicolon is included, ever. [[Category:Template implementation details|{{PAGENAME}}]]

{{#switch: {{{1|}}} | keyboard = #f0e68c | woodwind = #f4bf92 | brass = #bfe0bf | string = #b0c4de | percussion = #d8bfd8 | electronic = #b0e0e6 | other = #d3d3d3 | {{{1|#a9a9a9}}} }} ;NOTE This template is an implementation detail, encapsulating the color association we use for its parent template. It has a single unnamed parameter and expands to * if a name exists among the 16 names supported by the HTML 4.0 standard (aqua, black, blue, fuchsia, gray, green, lime, maroon, navy, olive, purple, red, silver, teal, white, yellow) * # otherwise. No final semicolon is included, ever. [[Category:Template implementation details|{{PAGENAME}}]]

{{#switch: {{{1|}}} | keyboard = #f0e68c | woodwind = #f4bf92 | brass = #bfe0bf | string = #b0c4de | percussion = #d8bfd8 | electronic = #b0e0e6 | other = #d3d3d3 | {{{1|#a9a9a9}}} }} ;NOTE This template is an implementation detail, encapsulating the color association we use for its parent template. It has a single unnamed parameter and expands to * if a name exists among the 16 names supported by the HTML 4.0 standard (aqua, black, blue, fuchsia, gray, green, lime, maroon, navy, olive, purple, red, silver, teal, white, yellow) * # otherwise. No final semicolon is included, ever. [[Category: implementation details|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{#switch: {{{1|}}} | keyboard = #f0e68c | woodwind = #f4bf92 | brass = #bfe0bf | string = #b0c4de | percussion = #d8bfd8 | electronic = #b0e0e6 | other = #d3d3d3 | {{{1|#a9a9a9}}} }} ;NOTE This template is an implementation detail, encapsulating the color association we use for its parent template. It has a single unnamed parameter and expands to * if a name exists among the 16 names supported by the HTML 4.0 standard (aqua, black, blue, fuchsia, gray, green, lime, maroon, navy, olive, purple, red, silver, teal, white, yellow) * # otherwise. No final semicolon is included, ever. [[Category: implementation details|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{#switch: {{{1|}}} | keyboard = #f0e68c | woodwind = #f4bf92 | brass = #bfe0bf | string = #b0c4de | percussion = #d8bfd8 | electronic = #b0e0e6 | other = #d3d3d3 | {{{1|#a9a9a9}}} }} ;NOTE This template is an implementation detail, encapsulating the color association we use for its parent template. It has a single unnamed parameter and expands to * if a name exists among the 16 names supported by the HTML 4.0 standard (aqua, black, blue, fuchsia, gray, green, lime, maroon, navy, olive, purple, red, silver, teal, white, yellow) * # otherwise. No final semicolon is included, ever. [[Category: implementation details|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

It has a single unnamed parameter and expands to * if a name exists among the 16 names supported by the HTML 4.0 standard (aqua, black, blue, fuchsia, gray, green, lime, maroon, navy, olive, purple, red, silver, teal, white, yellow) * # otherwise. No final semicolon is included, ever. [[Category: implementation details|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23460549766|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#switch: {{{1|}}} | keyboard = #f0e68c | woodwind = #f4bf92 | brass = #bfe0bf | string = #b0c4de | percussion = #d8bfd8 | electronic = #b0e0e6 | other = #d3d3d3 | {{{1|#a9a9a9}}} }} ;NOTE This template is an implementation detail, encapsulating the color association we use for its parent template. It has a single unnamed parameter and expands to * if a name exists among the 16 names supported by the HTML 4.0 standard (aqua, black, blue, fuchsia, gray, green, lime, maroon, navy, olive, purple, red, silver, teal, white, yellow) * # otherwise. No final semicolon is included, ever. [[Category: implementation details|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
